SPACECOWBOY-SPACE_COWBOY.title: The Space Cowboy
SPACECOWBOY-SPACE_COWBOY.description:
After a mishap traveling through the GATE, the space cowboy finds himself at the Spire.
Whatever happens, happens.
SPACECOWBOY-SPACE_COWBOY.cardsModifierDe: Space Cowboy cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
SPACECOWBOY-SPACE_COWBOY.eventDeathPreve: Not yet. There's still a bounty to collect.
SPACECOWBOY-SPACE_COWBOY.goldMonologue: Woolongs. Enough for beef with bell peppers. Maybe even the beef.
